クラス ObservationEncoder

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.ObservationEncoder
public class ObservationEncoder extends Object
Encodes simulator state into a fixed-size observation vector.

Layout: NUM_CHARS blocks of FEATURES_PER_CHARACTER features followed by GLOBAL_FEATURES global features.

Per-character block (18 dims):

  • [0–5] dynamic: energy ratio, isActive, skill readiness, burst readiness, isBurstActive, active-buff ratio
  • [6–13] static: element one-hot (8 dims, Element.values() order)
  • [14–17] static: off-field DPS ratio, team-buff score, self-enhancement score, energy-generation score

Global block (7 dims): swap readiness, time remaining, PYRO/HYDRO/ELECTRO/ANEMO aura, thundercloud active.

    説明
    static class 
    ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore
    Loads and caches character capability profiles from a JSON file.

    Number of static features per character slot (8 element one-hot + 4 capability scores).

    static final int
    GLOBAL_FEATURES
    Number of global features appended after all character blocks.

    Total observation vector length.

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    ObservationEncoder()
    Constructs an encoder that loads capability profiles from the default path (config/capability_profiles/profiles.json).
    ObservationEncoder(ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore profileStore)
    Constructs an encoder with an explicitly provided capability profile store.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • ObservationEncoder

      public ObservationEncoder()
      Constructs an encoder that loads capability profiles from the default path (config/capability_profiles/profiles.json).

    • ObservationEncoder

      public ObservationEncoder(ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore profileStore)
      Constructs an encoder with an explicitly provided capability profile store.
      パラメータ:
      profileStore - capability profile store; must not be null

  • メソッドの詳細

    • encode

      public double[] encode(CombatSimulator sim, EpisodeConfig config, double lastSwapTime)
      Encodes the current simulator state into a new observation array.
      パラメータ:
      sim - current combat simulator
      config - episode configuration
      lastSwapTime - simulation time of the most recent swap action
      戻り値:
      observation array of length OBSERVATION_SIZE

    • fillObservation

      public void fillObservation(CombatSimulator sim, EpisodeConfig config, double lastSwapTime, double[] observation)
      Fills an existing observation array in-place.
      パラメータ:
      sim - current combat simulator
      config - episode configuration
      lastSwapTime - simulation time of the most recent swap action
      observation - target array; must have length OBSERVATION_SIZE

    • isBurstActive

      private boolean isBurstActive(Character character, double currentTime)

    • countActiveBuffs

      private double countActiveBuffs(Character character, double currentTime)

    • normalizedAura

      private double normalizedAura(Enemy enemy, Element element)

    • clamp01

      private double clamp01(double value)
